title: Cuisine Delight Cobblemon
description: This datapack adds compatibility for Cuisine Delight with Cobblemon, letting you cook with the berries, leek, and vivichoke that is in the mod alongside with other food items from minecraft (or more!) to create the best and powerful dishes to aid you.
body:
Have you always wished you could just someway or another be able to use berries to make some delicious food? Now you can! With Cuisine Delight Cobblemon with the help of Cuisine Delight you can now use a wide variety of berry, medicinal leek and vivichoke alongside with other minecraft food to make a powerful and delicious custom dishes!

DEPENDENCIES (IMPORTANT)
- Farmer's Delight
- Cobblemon
- Cuisine Delight
